# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

Write secure code.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "mycompany/myapp",
    "description": "Application with automated setup scripts",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true,
    "require": {
        "php": ">=8.1"
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "config": {
        "process-timeout": 300,
        "sort-packages": true,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "composer/installers": true
        },
        "secure-http": true
    },
    "scripts": {
        "check-environment": [
            "@php scripts/check-environment.php"
        ],
        "setup-directories": [
            "mkdir -p var/cache var/log var/tmp public/assets/css public/assets/js public/assets/images",
            "chmod 755 var/cache var/log var/tmp"
        ],
        "generate-config": [
            "@php scripts/generate-config.php"
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ],
        "set-permissions": [
            "chmod -R 755 public/",
            "chmod -R 700 var/log var/cache",
            "chmod 600 config/*.php"
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "@php scripts/clear-cache.php"
        ],
        "run-migrations": [
            "@php scripts/run-migrations.php"
        ],
        "validate-setup": [
            "@php scripts/validate-setup.php"
        ],
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@check-environment",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@generate-config",
            "@download-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@set-permissions",
            "@run-migrations",
            "@clear-cache",
            "@validate-setup"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@check-environment",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@generate-config",
            "@download-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@set-permissions",
            "@clear-cache",
            "@validate-setup"
        ],
        "dev-setup": [
            "@post-install-cmd",
            "@php scripts/seed-database.php"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "check-environment": "Validates PHP version, extensions, and required system dependencies",
        "setup-directories": "Creates required application directories with secure permissions",
        "generate-config": "Generates application configuration from environment variables",
        "download-assets": "Downloads verified front-end assets from trusted CDN sources",
        "compile-assets": "Compiles and minifies CSS/JS assets for production",
        "set-permissions": "Sets secure file and directory permissions",
        "clear-cache": "Clears all application caches",
        "run-migrations": "Runs pending database migrations",
        "validate-setup": "Validates the complete application setup",
        "dev-setup": "Full development environment setup including database seeding"
    },
    "extra": {
        "asset-sources": {
            "trusted-hosts": [
                "cdn.jsdelivr.net",
                "cdnjs.cloudflare.com",
                "unpkg.com"
            ],
            "assets": [
                {
                    "url": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css",
                    "dest": "public/assets/css/bootstrap.min.css",
                    "integrity": "sha384-9ndCyUaIbzAi2FUVXJi0CjmCapSmO7gy3nBecRkAhOP6Hn2V65Yxqtqj3uXM"
                },
                {
                    "url": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js",
                    "dest": "public/assets/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js",
                    "integrity": "sha384-geWF76RCwLtnZ8qwWowPQNguL3RmwHVBC9FhGdlKrxdiJJigb/j/68SIy3Te4B"
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}
